required_statements.label: Backend default
required_statements.text: `state_vector` remains the default backend when no explicit backend is selected.

required_statements.label: Explicit density-matrix selection
required_statements.text: `density_matrix` must be selected explicitly for exact noisy mixed-state claims.

entry_point_phrases: No implicit `auto` mode or silent fallback is part of the Phase 2 contract.
required_statements.label: No fallback
primary_source_phrases: No implicit `auto` mode or silent fallback is part of the Phase 2 contract.
required_statements.text: No implicit `auto` mode or silent fallback is part of the Phase 2 contract.

entry_point_phrases: The canonical supported Phase 2 workflow is noisy VQE ground-state estimation
required_statements.label: Canonical workflow
primary_source_phrases: The Phase 2 anchor workflow is noisy VQE ground-state estimation
required_statements.text: The canonical supported Phase 2 workflow is noisy VQE ground-state estimation for a 1D XXZ spin chain with local `Z` field using the default `HEA` ansatz, explicit local noise insertion, and exact `Re Tr(H*rho)` evaluation.

entry_point_phrases: Full end-to-end workflow execution is required at 4 and 6 qubits.
required_statements.label: 4q and 6q end-to-end scope
primary_source_phrases: End-to-end workflow execution is mandatory at 4 and 6 qubits
required_statements.text: Full end-to-end workflow execution is required at 4 and 6 qubits.

entry_point_phrases: Benchmark-ready fixed-parameter evaluation is required at 8 and 10 qubits.
required_statements.label: 8q and 10q benchmark scope
primary_source_phrases: Benchmark-ready fixed-parameter evaluation is mandatory at 8 and 10 qubits
required_statements.text: Benchmark-ready fixed-parameter evaluation is required at 8 and 10 qubits.

entry_point_phrases: The documented 10-qubit case is the acceptance anchor for the current exact regime.
required_statements.label: 10-qubit anchor
primary_source_phrases: 10 qubits treated as the acceptance anchor for the exact regime
required_statements.text: The documented 10-qubit case is the acceptance anchor for the current exact regime.
